scenarios.description: child(0) on element with no children throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (childNodeSize==0 branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); // no children

scenarios.description: child(0) on element with only non-Element nodes returns IndexOutOfBoundsException (filter produces empty list)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("p"); el.appendChild(new TextNode("text"));
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IndexOutOfBoundsException; no Element in childElementsList

scenarios.description: child(0) on element with one direct Element child returns that child (loop-1 build case)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); Element child = new Element("span"); parent.appendChild(child);
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the <span> child element

scenarios.description: child(last) on element with multiple Element children returns correct child (loop-N build case)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("ul"); parent.appendChild(new Element("li")); parent.appendChild(new Element("li")); parent.appendChild(new Element("li"));
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the third <li> child element

scenarios.description: child(-1) on element with Element children throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (negative index)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new Element("a")); parent.appendChild(new Element("b"));

scenarios.description: child(0) with mixed nodes returns first Element child (filter skips non-Element)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendChild(new TextNode("T")); Element e1 = new Element("span"); el.appendChild(e1); el.appendChild(new Comment("c"));
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the <span> element at original index 1

scenarios.description: child(1) on cached childElementsList returns correct child without rebuilding (cache branch)
scenarios.path: entryâ†’childNodeSize>0â†’build list loopĂ—2â†’set shadowChildrenRefâ†’return childrenâ†’get(1); entryâ†’childNodeSize>0â†’shadowChildrenRef.get()!=nullâ†’return cachedâ†’get(1)
scenarios.precondition: Element p = new Element("div"); Element a = new Element("i"); Element b = new Element("b"); p.appendChild(a); p.appendChild(b);
scenarios.expectedResult: first call and second call both return the same <b> child element instance

scenarios.description: child(size) on element with n children throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (upper bound)
scenarios.precondition: Element p = new Element("ul"); p.appendChild(new Element("li")); p.appendChild(new Element("li"));

scenarios.description: child(0) on element after clear children via empty() throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (nodelistChanged clears cache)
scenarios.precondition: Element p = new Element("p"); p.appendChild(new Element("a")); p.empty();

scenarios.description: child(0) on element with deep hierarchy returns first direct child only (depth ignored by childElementsList)
scenarios.precondition: Element root = new Element("div"); Element parent = new Element("span"); Element leaf = new Element("i"); parent.appendChild(leaf); root.appendChild(parent);
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the <span> element, not its <i> child
